purpose: Staged onboarding model for low-friction service adoption into UAP.

A.name: visibility-only
A.description: Collect signals without blocking merges or promotions.
exit_criteria: preflight command executed at least once

B.name: soft-gates
B.description: Surface gate failures as warnings and require owner acknowledgment.
entry_criteria: all Stage A exit criteria met

C.name: hard-gates
C.description: Enforce policy gates for promotion and release decisions.
entry_criteria: all Stage B exit criteria met
service runbook and rollback notes linked
